criteria_results.criterion: Add Improvement button on step-detail-panel opens Radix Dialog with title/description/priority fields; pre-fills linked_step_id; calls createImprovementIdea(); toast on success/error
criteria_results.evidence: step-detail-panel.tsx: createImprovementIdea imported (line 45), Add Improvement Button with Lightbulb icon (line 561-563), DialogPrimitive.Title (BUG-023 pattern, line 574), dialog has title input + description textarea + priority dropdown, handleAddImprovement calls createImprovementIdea with workspace_id/title/description/priority/linked_step_id (lines 184-190), toastError on catch (line 194). BUILD_RESULT_1 confirms section-detail-panel (+83 lines) and touchpoint-detail-panel (+91 lines) received same pattern.

criteria_results.criterion: New page at /w/[workspaceId]/improvements — server component page.tsx fetches improvement ideas, passes to client improvements-view.tsx
criteria_results.evidence: improvements/page.tsx exists (55 lines): createClient(), auth guard, Promise.all fetching improvement_ideas + steps + sections + touchpoints, builds entityNames/entityTabMap lookups, renders <ImprovementsView>. Static route confirmed as server component (no 'use client').

criteria_results.criterion: Improvements view: filterable list by status tabs (All/Proposed/Approved/In Progress/Completed/Rejected) and priority filter dropdown; cards show title, status badge, priority badge, linked element link, description preview
criteria_results.evidence: improvements-view.tsx: status tabs rendered from ALL_STATUSES (line 94-107) + All button; priority filter <select> with ALL_PRIORITIES (line 113-119). Cards show idea.title (line 156), status badge via STATUS_CONFIG (proposed=gray, approved=blue, in_progress=yellow, completed=green, rejected=red), priority badge via PRIORITY_CONFIG (low=gray, medium=blue, high=yellow, critical=red), description with line-clamp-2 (line 200), linked entity Link to /w/workspaceId/tabId (lines 209-213).

criteria_results.criterion: Inline status change via dropdown on each card — calls updateImprovementIdea()
criteria_results.evidence: improvements-view.tsx: DropdownMenu on status badge (lines 161-184), handleStatusChange calls updateImprovementIdea(idea.id, {status: newStatus}) and updates local state optimistically (lines 58-65), toastError on failure.

criteria_results.criterion: Sidebar nav item 'Improvements' with Lightbulb icon, positioned between Prioritization and Comments, badge showing open count (not completed/rejected)
criteria_results.evidence: sidebar.tsx NAV_ITEMS array (lines 35-55): Lightbulb imported (line 23), Improvements item at index 7 between Prioritization (index 6) and Comments (index 8). useEffect fetches /api/v1/improvement-ideas?workspace_id=... and filters status !== 'completed' && !== 'rejected' (lines 62-73). Badge renders as text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-[var(--accent-blue)] text-white (line 130).

criteria_results.criterion: 'improvements' added to workspace-shell.tsx reserved paths array (line 47)
criteria_results.evidence: workspace-shell.tsx line 47: reserved paths array includes 'improvements' alongside teams, people, tools, settings, list, gap-analysis, compare, comments, dashboard, runbooks, activity, perspectives, prioritization.

criteria_results.criterion: !p.includes('/improvements') added to sidebar.tsx Workflows active check
criteria_results.evidence: sidebar.tsx line 40: Workflows active function includes && !p.includes('/improvements') in the exclusion chain alongside /comments, /prioritization, etc.

criteria_results.criterion: Delete Perspective confirmation dialog footer button reads 'Delete Perspective' instead of 'Delete'
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx line 462-463: <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleConfirmDeletePerspective} loading={deletingPerspective}>Delete Perspective</Button>. Dialog title also reads 'Delete Perspective' (line 453) providing full context.

criteria_results.criterion: When no items have effort/impact scores, empty state shows 'Go to Canvas' link navigating to /w/{workspaceId}/{firstTabId}; hidden if no tabs; styled text-[var(--accent-blue)] hover:underline
criteria_results.evidence: prioritization-view.tsx lines 164-175: plotItems.length === 0 branch renders flex-col container with existing message in <span> + conditional <Link href={/w/${workspaceId}/${tabs[0].id}} className="text-[var(--accent-blue)] hover:underline"> wrapped in {tabs.length > 0 && (...)}. All 3 sub-criteria met.

bugs_found.description: Production deployment (stride-five-sigma.vercel.app) does not reflect iteration 108 changes. The improvements page renders an empty React Flow canvas instead of the ImprovementsView. The sidebar shows only 6 nav items (Workflows, List View, Teams, People, Tools, Settings) — missing Improvements, Gap Analysis, Compare, Perspectives, Prioritization, Comments, Runbooks, Activity nav items. Settings page shows only Workspace Name + Delete Workspace, no Perspectives section. This confirms the production Vercel deployment is running pre-iteration-108 code and the ralph/init-stride branch has NOT been merged to main or deployed.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to https://stride-five-sigma.vercel.app/w/26962042-b3cd-49b9-a917-1daaf0fd25e3/improvements. 2. Observe canvas renders instead of improvements list. 3. Check sidebar — Improvements nav item missing.

bugs_found.description: BUILD_RESULT_2.json has iteration: 54 but the current plan is iteration 108. Metadata mismatch — the file was not updated to the current iteration number. The actual code change (Delete Perspective label) is correct in the source file, but this tracking discrepancy can cause confusion when correlating build results to iterations in the pipeline.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Read knowledge/handoffs/BUILD_RESULT_2.json — iteration field shows 54. 2. Compare to EXECUTION_PLAN.json — iteration field shows 108.

improvements_found.observation: ImprovementsView has no 'Delete' action on cards. Users can change status to 'Rejected' as a soft-delete, but cannot permanently remove erroneous entries. The acceptance criteria didn't require delete, but other entity lists (comments, tasks) typically offer delete.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H3: User control and freedom — provide undo/delete for irreversible states
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a delete icon button on each card that calls deleteImprovementIdea() with confirmation, matching the pattern in comments-view.tsx.

improvements_found.observation: Improvements page empty state does not show a CTA to navigate to canvas (unlike prioritization). When the workspace has no improvement ideas, a subtle 'Add from a step or touchpoint detail panel' hint is shown, but there is no direct link to get started.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — guide users to where they can take action
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a 'Go to Canvas' link in the improvements page empty state (same pattern implemented for IMP-053 in prioritization-view.tsx).

improvements_found.observation: Status filter buttons on the ImprovementsView use plain <button> elements without aria-pressed to indicate active state. Screen readers cannot determine the selected filter.
improvements_found.design_principle: WCAG 4.1.2: Name, Role, Value — interactive components must convey state
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add aria-pressed={statusFilter === status} to each filter button.
